session.tool_result:
1→"""Plan save: creates a planned PR with the plan content. 2→ 3→Usage: 4→ erk exec plan-save [OPTIONS] 5→ 6→Options: 7→ --format json|display: Output format (default: json) 8→ --plan-file PATH: Use specific plan file (highest priority) 9→ --session-id ID: Session ID for scoped plan lookup 10→ --plan-type standard|learn: Plan type (default: standard) 11→ --learned-from-issue INT: Parent plan (for learn plans) 12→ --created-from-workflow-run-url URL: Workflow run URL 13→ 14→Objective linking: use --objective to pass directly, or rely on 15→automatic linking via the objective-context session marker 16→(created by /erk:objective-plan). The --objective flag takes 17→precedence over the session marker. 18→ 19→Exit Codes: 20→ 0: Success 21→ 1: Error 22→ 2: Validation failed 23→""" 24→ 25→import json 26→from pathlib import Path 27→ 28→import click 29→ 30→from erk.cli.commands.exec.scripts.validate_plan_content import _validate_plan_content
... [556 lines omitted] ...
162→ click.echo(f"Error: {title_validation.message}", err=True) 168→ "error": f"Plan title validation failed: {title_validation.reason}", 169→ "error_type": "validation_failed", 183→ click.echo("Error: --current-branch requires a checked-out branch.", err=True) 190→ "Error: --branch-slug is required. " 222→ click.echo(f"Error: {create_result.message}", err=True) 314→ raise RuntimeError(msg) 418→ click.echo("Error: No plan found in ~/.claude/plans/", err=True) 420→ click.echo(json.dumps({"success": False, "error": "No plan found in ~/.claude/plans/"})) 450→ valid, error, details = _validate_plan_content(plan) 453→ click.echo(f"Error: Plan validation failed: {error}", err=True) 459→ "error": f"Plan validation failed: {error}", 460→ "error_type": "validation_failed",

Perfect! I have successfully completed the task. Here's a summary of the changes made:
## Summary
I renamed all occurrences of `validate_plan_title` to `validate_pr_title` in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/plan_save.py`:
### Changes Made:
1. **Line 49** - Import statement updated: - Changed: `validate_plan_title,` → `validate_pr_title,`
2. **Line 159** - Function call updated: - Changed: `title_validation = validate_plan_title(title)` → `title_validation = validate_pr_title(title)`
### What Was Preserved:
- All variable names (e.g., `title_validation`, `title`) remain unchanged - All string literals (e.g., comments, error messages) remain unchanged - Comments describing the validation logic remain unchanged
The renaming is now complete and consistent throughout the file.
